query: UPDATE establishments SET categoryId = 30001 WHERE categoryId = 15 AND (LOWER(name) LIKE '%vegan%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%vegano%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%vegana%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%vegetarian%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%vegetariano%');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute UPDATE establishments SET categoryId = 30001 WHERE categoryId = 15 AND (LOWER(name) LIKE '%vegan%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%vegano%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%vegana%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%vegetarian%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%vegetariano%');
